title: Amid War, G.O.P. Puts Off Testimony From Senior Pentagon Commanders
summary_full: House lawmakers had been scheduled to hear testimony next week from the head of military operations in the Middle East, but the Republican majority postponed the hearing until late May.
summary_public: House lawmakers had been scheduled to hear testimony next week from the head of military operations in the Middle East, but the Republican majority postponed the hearing until late May.
